shortDescription.text: The analyzed content is purely informational or documentation-style.

fullDescription.text: This rule identifies content that serves as documentation, guides, or informational text, providing explanations, structural definitions, or usage examples without containing executable malicious code or promoting unsafe practices. Such content is classified as benign.

message.text: The analyzed content is documentation for ReactUMG color management. External threat intelligence from yarnpkg.com and mcpmarket.com *CONFIRMS* the legitimacy of ReactUMG as a UI development framework for Unreal Engine and the specific purpose of this skill. No suspicious lines were identified in the initial analysis. No confirmed malicious intent or dangerous security practices were found. Note: The exact source code was not provided, so a code snippet cannot be included.
